title: Basic Instructional Program: Required Instruction (All Levels)
description: Conroe ISD is required by state law to provide instruction in specific subject areas at all grade levels, including reading, math, science, social studies, health, and physical education. This policy outlines the core subjects and programs that must be part of every student's education throughout their time in the district. Parents and community members can use this information to understand the foundational learning experiences all students are expected to receive.
